name: Aloha Bread
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Can of crushed pineapple, well-drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the bread pan.
2. Select light crust setting and press start.
3. Bake for a 1-1/2 lb loaf.
4. After baking cycle ends, remove bread from pan and place on rack.
5. Allow to cool for 1 hour before slicing.
